one_line_thesis: AI data centre developer with accelerating revenue ($126.6M FQ3, +139% YoY) and 600+ MW of signed leases (CoreWeave, hyperscaler). FQ3 GAAP net income $100.9M includes $59.7M discontinued-operation gain (Cloud held-for-sale); continuing ops still loss-making on adjusted basis. Customer concentration and layered debt/preferred stack require capital-structure diligence before conviction sizing.

deep_dive.executive_summary: Applied Digital is transitioning from crypto-era hosting to a 1.2 GW contracted lease book across four AI Factory campuses. FQ3 2026 adjusted EBITDA was $44.1 million; GAAP net income was $100.9M but includes a $59.7M discontinued-operation gain on Cloud Services held-for-sale, so continuing economics still require adjusted metrics. The May 20, 2026 Polaris Forge 3 deal adds 300 MW and ~$7.5 billion base revenue with the same hyperscaler as Delta Forge 1, lifting disclosed contracted revenue to ~$31 billion. This refresh attaches filing-grounded calculation proofs to all four valuation comp...

pricing_analysis.conclusion: Hurdle prices are derived from the decision-grade universal contract; they do not constitute a capital decision.

decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: The range includes delay and failure outcomes; dated cash realization remains [HUMAN REVIEW].
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is explicit analyst judgment pending a primary-source milestone and ownership reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital, financing, and dilution are reserved until the primary sources-and-uses bridge is complete.

options.tax_and_realization_adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
options.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
applicability_tests: The security owns a legally enforceable economic claim on scarce assets or royalties.
Material value is omitted or poorly represented by current GAAP earnings.
Asset quantities, ownership, overlap, timing, and remaining capital can be reconciled.
Comparable values can be adjusted for location, quality, control, liquidity, and realization time.
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: The current component schedule is the first decision-grade baseline; attribution begins with the next dated valuation snapshot.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Existing research and filing-derived valuation inputs. The primary-source reconciliation remains an open evidence gate.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of APLD, including every currently identified operating claim, financial claim, liability, reserve, and material option.
economic_claim.unit_source: Derived from inputs.shares_millions in the pre-existing valuation.json; [HUMAN REVIEW] confirm against the latest primary filing.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are separate components or explicitly reserved. No component is intended to overlap another.

timeline.label: Long-term debt was not reported in the prior period and is now 869,485.0 (USD thousands).
Capital Expenditures moved +380.6% versus the prior period (141,809.0 to 681,603.0).
Polaris Forge 3: 300 MW / ~$7.5B base lease with same IG hyperscaler as Delta Forge; portfolio reaches ~1.2 GW contracted / ~$31B base revenue.
FQ3 FY2026: revenue $126.6M (+139% YoY); Cloud Services classified held-for-sale; equity $1.58B.
Co-founder Jason Zhang appointed President (8-K cluster).
FY2025 10-K: revenue $144.2M; long-term debt $869.5M; heavy capex $681.6M; equity $497.7M.
Fiscal year-end; pivot from crypto hosting to AI/HPC data-center lease model largely complete.
Multiple 424B5 offerings fund campus construction (S-3/424B5 series in download manifest).
Public listing / rebrand to Applied Digital; early crypto data-center operations.

industry.structure: AI/HPC data-center landlords compete for hyperscaler take-or-pay leases; power and grid access are the scarce inputs; few scaled operators with multi-GW pipelines.
industry.share_shift: Applied Digital is gaining share via Polaris Forge and Delta Forge campuses with investment-grade hyperscalers; legacy crypto hosting is exited (Cloud held-for-sale).
industry.trend: Hyperscaler capex and GPU density drive demand for dedicated power campuses; construction financing and tenant concentration remain industry-wide risks.
